description: These embellished sandals from catwalk add a fresh twist to your ethnic or boho wardrobe with their colourful stones. The simple design is perfect for everyday wear. Team these with salwar suits or jeans and tops.UpperSynthetic leather thong style strap extending from the forefoot and midfoot and looped around the ankleBead and sequin work on the strapsElasticated ankle strap on the back for added comfortCushioned footbed in an ergonomic design for extra comfort and added styleOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured design on the forefoot and has a flower shaped heel for added comfortSandal careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
